title: Market Brief — Wednesday, June 17, 2026
summary: GPU supply is loose and getting looser. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 37% for H100, 45% for H200, and 55% for B200, meaning every class sits in comfortable surplus territory with B200 approaching oversupply. H200 and B200 spot prices both dropped over 4% day-over-day, while H200 volatility at 183% annualized signals a market still hunting for a clearing price.
paragraphs: GPU supply is loose and getting looser. Util-avail stands at 36% for A100, 37% for H100, 45% for H200, and 55% for B200, meaning every class sits in comfortable surplus territory with B200 approaching oversupply. H200 and B200 spot prices both dropped over 4% day-over-day, while H200 volatility at 183% annualized signals a market still hunting for a clearing price.

B200 is the only GPU where mid-tier inference operators break even on Llama 70B at TCO-adjusted cost of $3.84/M tokens. H100 operators selling at medium-tier pricing face a loss of roughly $10/M tokens against TCO-adjusted cost of $8.80/M. Provider grades: OpenAI Neutral, running a wide portfolio from $0.18 to $80 output. Anthropic Neutral, holding premium pricing. Google Strong on value with Flash at $2.50 output. DeepSeek Strong, undercutting everyone at $0.34 output on V3.2.

OpenAI o3 Pro at $80/M output is overvalued when GPT-5.4 matches frontier quality at $15/M and DeepSeek V3.2 delivers competitive reasoning at $0.34/M. Undervalued trade: long B200 spot at $4.19/hr against short H100 at $2.41/hr, capturing the 49% mid-tier margin advantage on B200 as utilization normalizes.
bullets: 55% util-avail on B200 makes it the loosest GPU class, with utilization dropping 44.4 percentage points in 30 days.
37% util-avail on H100 reflects a 32.9 percentage point utilization collapse in one month.
$0.34/M output tokens makes DeepSeek V3.2 the cheapest frontier-class model, 73x cheaper than OpenAI o3 Pro.
183% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI is 3x the A100 rate, signaling unstable price discovery.
$3.07/M tokens gives B200 the lowest raw inference cost, half the H100 figure of $7.04/M.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen 78% from the GPT-4 launch baseline.
